ModMetaData.name: Pawn Diary — Example Adapter (template)
ModMetaData.author: aimmlegate
ModMetaData.description:
Building a Pawn Diary integration? This is the working example and API playground I wish every mod API shipped with.
Open the API Explorer in dev mode, try any public call on a pawn, and see the result immediately. The source is included, so you can copy the adapter and turn it into your own.
For modders, not normal gameplay. Requires Pawn Diary.
